note.zh: 在隔离测评工作区中，通过 AntiGravity CLI 1.1.5 的精确选择器 gemini-3.6-flash-high（High）使用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成，未经人工修改；runner 仅将模型写出的 index.html 按案例规范逐字节复制为 mythos-craft.html。原生系统提示正常启用，工作区未注入 AGENTS.md、额外上下文文件、外部 Skill、插件或 MCP，外部 URL 与 Web Search 动作被阻断。AntiGravity 未提供可验证的内置 Skill 与上下文发现总开关，因此本次隔离状态如实记录为 partial。CLI 未回报运行时模型 ID，归因依据为其本地目录中已选择的精确模型档位。
note.en: Generated one-shot from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt in an isolated benchmark workspace using AntiGravity CLI 1.1.5 with the exact gemini-3.6-flash-high selector (High), with no human edits; the runner only made a byte-identical canonical-name copy from index.html to mythos-craft.html. The native system prompt remained enabled, no AGENTS.md, extra context files, external skills, plugins, or MCP were injected, and outbound URL and Web Search actions were blocked. AntiGravity exposes no verifiable master switch for its bundled skills or context discovery, so isolation is truthfully recorded as partial. The CLI did not report a runtime model ID; attribution is based on the exact selected catalog entry.

note.zh: 在相同隔离配置下，通过 AntiGravity CLI 1.1.5 的精确选择器 gemini-3.6-flash-high（High）使用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成的完整 Vite、React、TypeScript 与 Three.js 工程，源码未经人工修改；公开仓排除依赖与构建目录，站点以原始源码执行 Vite 预览构建。该预览构建成功，项目自带的严格 TypeScript 检查存在两处错误并按测评规则原样保留。原生系统提示正常启用，未注入 AGENTS.md、额外上下文文件、外部 Skill、插件或 MCP，外部 URL 与 Web Search 动作被阻断；由于 AntiGravity 没有可验证的内置 Skill 与上下文发现总开关，隔离状态为 partial。CLI 未回报运行时模型 ID，归因依据为已选择的精确模型档位。
note.en: A complete Vite, React, TypeScript, and Three.js project generated one-shot from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt under the same isolated configuration using AntiGravity CLI 1.1.5 with the exact gemini-3.6-flash-high selector (High). The source is unmodified; dependencies and generated build directories are excluded from the public repository, and the site runs its Vite preview build from the raw source. That preview build succeeds, while two errors from the project's own strict TypeScript check are retained as generated under benchmark rules. The native system prompt remained enabled, no AGENTS.md, extra context files, external skills, plugins, or MCP were injected, and outbound URL and Web Search actions were blocked. Because AntiGravity has no verifiable master switch for bundled skills or context discovery, isolation is recorded as partial. The CLI did not report a runtime model ID; attribution is based on the exact selected catalog entry.

note.zh: 在相同隔离配置下，通过 AntiGravity CLI 1.1.5 的精确选择器 gemini-3.6-flash-high（High）使用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成圈地智能体，模型自命名为「乾坤极圈」。进程正常退出并产生完整策略，但静态验收发现源码引用禁用的 Math.random，因此本次运行判定失败；按一次性测评规则不修补、不重跑，原始策略仅保存于闭源裁判仓。原生系统提示正常启用，未注入 AGENTS.md、额外上下文文件、外部 Skill、插件或 MCP，外部 URL 与 Web Search 动作被阻断；由于 AntiGravity 没有可验证的内置 Skill 与上下文发现总开关，隔离状态为 partial。CLI 未回报运行时模型 ID，归因依据为已选择的精确模型档位。
note.en: A Turf War agent generated one-shot from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt under the same isolated configuration using AntiGravity CLI 1.1.5 with the exact gemini-3.6-flash-high selector (High), self-named "乾坤极圈". The process exited normally and produced a complete policy, but static acceptance found a reference to the forbidden Math.random API, so the run is recorded as failed. Under one-shot benchmark rules it was neither repaired nor rerun, and the original policy is stored only in the closed referee repository. The native system prompt remained enabled, no AGENTS.md, extra context files, external skills, plugins, or MCP were injected, and outbound URL and Web Search actions were blocked. Because AntiGravity has no verifiable master switch for bundled skills or context discovery, isolation is recorded as partial. The CLI did not report a runtime model ID; attribution is based on the exact selected catalog entry.
